summary: iter238 — i18n FR/EN audit + DCQ paid multi-lang fallback. Backend: 7/7 pytest pass (i18n preferences toggle, /paid/config pool_size with FR fallback, schema language column + index, worker SUPPORTED_LANGS + lang-aware prompts, /paid/start non-500). Frontend: i18n EN switch confirmed visually on /services (English labels: 'Services / Explore the JAPAP ecosystem / Marketplace / JAPAP Staking / Crowdfunding / Games'). LoginPage shows 'Remember me' in EN. i18n key files aligned 1048/1048 (no missing keys, all required nav.*, services.*, auth.remember_me*, feed.*, chat.amount_usd present in both fr.json and en.json). No crashes on /feed, /chat, /wallet, /profile. PUT /api/auth/preferences {preferred_lang} returns 200 and persists.

ui_bugs.issue: No stable data-testid on the burger/drawer-toggle button — drawer-link-groups/pages only render once the drawer opens, so E2E tests need a reliable handle. Recommend adding data-testid="drawer-toggle" on the burger.

integration_issues.issue: After successful PUT, the SPA does not always re-fetch /me on next route navigation, so i18n may require a full reload to propagate. Consider triggering UserContext refresh + i18n.changeLanguage(lang) on success.

action_items: (LOW) Add data-testid="drawer-toggle" on the mobile burger button in Layout.js for stable E2E selectors.
(LOW/UX) After PUT /api/auth/preferences success, trigger UserContext refresh + i18n.changeLanguage(lang) so the language switches without full reload.
critical_code_review_comments: dcq_paid.py /paid/start lines 396-411: pool size guard uses unfiltered count (no language filter). When EN questions exist but the user's lang+FR pool is exhausted, the 503 may trigger inconsistently. Consider filtering by language IN ($1,'fr') for consistency with the SELECT at l.417-425.

dcq_paid_pool_worker.py _refresh_pool: nested loop runs sequentially per category × language (6 × 2 × ~10 questions = ~120 LLM calls + ~120 validation calls per refresh). Consider asyncio.gather per language to roughly halve wall-clock.
i18n key parity: 1048/1048 confirmed aligned, but no automated CI guard. Recommend a small JS test (Jest) or shell script diffing flatten(fr) vs flatten(en) on PR to prevent future drift.
seed_data_creation: None — used existing Alice account; preferred_lang toggled en→fr→en and restored to fr at end.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest /app/backend/tests/test_iter238_i18n_dcq.py covers: i18n preferences toggle, DCQ paid /config pool_size FR fallback (EN user receives FR questions from existing 1552-question FR pool), schema language column + idx_dcep_active_lang index, worker SUPPORTED_LANGS multi-lang prompts. Run with PYTEST_DISABLE_PLUGIN_AUTOLOAD=1 to avoid web3 ethereum plugin import error (eth_typing.ContractName). For UI testing: login via the form (in-page captcha math must be solved by the script — fetch from page context is blocked by service worker before login). PUT /api/auth/preferences requires Bearer token + X-CSRF-Token header from cookie 'csrf_token'.
